text: Made with corn dough and wood ash, these tamales are steamed in corn husks and served with tomato salsa. Earthy, soft, and deeply traditional — a staple of local celebrations.
Rainbow trout raised in nearby springs, sautéed with garlic and herbs. Fresh, aromatic, and a proud product of Zitácuaro’s aquaculture legacy.
A fermented pineapple drink flavored with cinnamon and sugar. Sweet, tangy, and refreshing — it’s one of the region’s oldest bottled beverages.
